description: This source file defines the 'User' entity class for a Java Spring Boot application, mapping to a 'users' database table. It includes fields like id, email, passwordHash, emailVerified, and createdAt, along with constructors and getters/setters.

classes.name: User
classes.description: Entity class representing a user with fields for id, email, password hash, email verification status, and creation timestamp.

methods.name: User()
methods.description: Default constructor for the User entity.

methods.name: User(String email, String passwordHash)
methods.description: Parameterized constructor to initialize a User with email and password hash.

methods.name: getId()
methods.description: Returns the unique identifier of the user.

methods.name: getEmail()
methods.description: Returns the email of the user.

methods.name: setEmail(String email)
methods.description: Sets the email of the user.

methods.name: getPasswordHash()
methods.description: Returns the password hash of the user.

methods.name: setPasswordHash(String passwordHash)
methods.description: Sets the password hash of the user.

methods.name: isEmailVerified()
methods.description: Checks if the email has been verified.

methods.name: getCreatedAt()
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when the user was created.
